description.es: Cambio chico o explicación. Un agente, sin fan-out.
description.en: Small change or explanation. One agent, no fan-out.

description.es: El dominio cambia la ejecución. Un especialista.
Credenciales, pagos, producción o destrucción. Gate humano.
description.en: Credentials, payments, production, or destruction. Human gate.

body.es: Una skill/workflow y sus referencias directas.
Paralelismo, research profundo o alto riesgo con evidencia.
body.en: Parallelism, deep research, or high risk with evidence.

capabilities.name: Agente Academic Tutor
capabilities.description: Tutors university subjects with deep explanations, honest evaluation, exercises, exam preparation, and delegation to Obsidian for vault edits.

capabilities.name: Agente AI Architect
capabilities.description: Designs production AI and RAG systems with separated services, agents, prompts, security, evaluation, observability, and cost controls.

capabilities.name: Agente Code Reviewer
capabilities.description: Reviews diffs, PRs, implementation plans, and completed changes for bugs, regressions, edge cases, maintainability, and validation gaps.

capabilities.name: Agente Design
capabilities.description: Handles CSS, responsive design, visual polish, accessibility details, dark mode, animations, and UI component presentation.

capabilities.name: Agente Docs
capabilities.description: Writes technical documentation, README sections, API docs, changelogs, docstrings, usage guides, and implementation handoffs.

capabilities.name: Agente Growth SEO GEO
capabilities.description: Builds organic acquisition plans across SEO, GEO, AEO, local SEO, programmatic SEO, backlinks, Search Console, and AI search visibility.

capabilities.name: Agente Marketing Strategist
capabilities.description: Plans positioning, go-to-market strategy, audience research, launch messaging, campaigns, and marketing systems without executing paid actions.

capabilities.name: Agente MCP Architect
capabilities.description: Designs, evaluates, and documents MCP integrations, MCP catalogs, OpenCode MCP configuration, and tool permission boundaries.

capabilities.name: Agente Obsidian Brain
capabilities.description: Maintains Obsidian vault workflows, class notes, flashcards, inbox triage, Zettelkasten links, MOCs, and dashboards.

capabilities.name: Agente Principal
capabilities.description: Implements application logic, integrations, auth, APIs, database work, routing, middleware, and general production code outside specialist scopes.

capabilities.name: Agente Product Founder
capabilities.description: Shapes product ideas, MVP scope, indie hacking bets, validation criteria, launch sequencing, AI-first opportunities, and kill keep scale decisions.

capabilities.name: Agente Release Manager
capabilities.description: Prepares commits, changelogs, release checklists, repo publication, cross-machine installation validation, and release hygiene.

capabilities.name: Agente Researcher
capabilities.description: Researches current documentation, libraries, MCPs, plugins, competitors, and implementation approaches before recommendations.

capabilities.name: Agente Security Auditor
capabilities.description: Reviews secrets, unsafe commands, dependency risk, MCP and plugin permissions, auth handling, publication safety, and automation blast radius.

capabilities.name: Agente SEO
capabilities.description: Handles technical and on-page SEO including metadata, Open Graph, headings, schema, canonical URLs, sitemap, robots, and alt text.

capabilities.name: Agente Tests
capabilities.description: Designs and reviews unit tests, integration tests, E2E tests, coverage, fixtures, mocks, and regression evidence.

capabilities.name: Agente X Content Strategist
capabilities.description: Plans and drafts X/Twitter, LinkedIn, Substack, threads, replies, quote tweets, and personal branding content without ad spend or DMs.

capabilities.name: Anti Slop Design
capabilities.description: Avoid generic AI-looking interfaces; enforce craft and specificity.

capabilities.name: Cli
capabilities.description: IDE/runtime adapter (stable): PowerShell route and doctor commands.

capabilities.name: Executing Plans
capabilities.description: Execute written plans with review checkpoints.

capabilities.name: Finishing A Development Branch
capabilities.description: On-demand skill: Finishing A Development Branch.

capabilities.name: Frontend Design
capabilities.description: Production frontend direction, hierarchy, and distinctive UI systems.

capabilities.name: Kickoff Architect
capabilities.description: Creates concise project or feature kickoff plans with first milestone, minimum viable structure, and appropriate process intensity.

capabilities.name: Mcts Planner
capabilities.description: Branch exploration for complex architecture decisions.

capabilities.name: Procedural Memory
capabilities.description: Capture durable lessons after completed work.

capabilities.name: Product Foundry
capabilities.description: MVP scoping, product validation, and venture decisions.

capabilities.name: Self Healing Ci
capabilities.description: Repair broken tests from current app state.

capabilities.name: Seo Geo Growth
capabilities.description: SEO/GEO/AEO acquisition strategy with measurable plans.

capabilities.name: Verification Before Completion
capabilities.description: Require fresh evidence before claiming done.

capabilities.name: Workflow Pruner
capabilities.description: Simplifies bloated prompts, workflows, skills, agent setups, and operating models by reducing token cost and removing low-value process.

request.es: Necesito un portfolio con evidencia real y pruebas Playwright antes de publicarlo.
request.en: I need a portfolio with real evidence and Playwright checks before publishing.

validation.es: Syntax check + unit + E2E desktop/mobile + reduced-motion.
validation.en: Syntax check + unit + desktop/mobile E2E + reduced-motion.

memory.es: Lección: evidencia antes de claims; no inventar métricas.
memory.en: Lesson: evidence before claims; never invent metrics.

result.es: Portfolio local verificable con rutas de evidencia y CTAs claros.
result.en: Local verifiable portfolio with evidence paths and clear CTAs.

note.es: Representación explicativa basada en commits reales del portfolio (operations surface + verification).
note.en: Explanatory representation based on real portfolio commits (operations surface + verification).

request.es: Necesito contratos portables de capacidades y budgets entre varios IDEs.
request.en: I need portable capability and budget contracts across multiple IDEs.

validation.es: JSON schemas + conteos cruzados agents/skills/workflows + adapters render.
validation.en: JSON schemas + cross-counts for agents/skills/workflows + adapter render.

memory.es: Lección: no precargar toda la biblioteca; T0→T3 con budgets por lane.
memory.en: Lesson: never preload the full library; T0→T3 with per-lane budgets.

note.es: Basado en el trabajo real de contratos portables del runtime (julio 2026).
note.en: Based on real portable runtime contract work (July 2026).

request.es: Revisá el multiagent review loop por riesgos de seguridad y robustez.
request.en: Review the multiagent review loop for security and robustness risks.

validation.es: Diff review + gates de aprobación humana + sin secretos expuestos.
validation.en: Diff review + human approval gates + no exposed secrets.

memory.es: Lección: HIGH_RISK requiere aprobación explícita y no auto-merge.
memory.en: Lesson: HIGH_RISK requires explicit approval and no auto-merge.

result.es: Parches de seguridad/robustez documentados en el runtime.
result.en: Documented security/robustness patches in the runtime.

note.es: Basado en el commit de parches de seguridad del review loop.
note.en: Based on the security patch commit for the review loop.

honesty.es: Esto es un snapshot público generado offline. No ejecuta agentes en vivo ni implica que las 19 capacidades agent se activen siempre.
honesty.en: This is a public offline-generated snapshot. It does not run live agents and does not imply all 19 agent capabilities always activate.
